STORY MUST BE CRYSTAL CLEAR. Two tourists: Tourist A is a young woman with ponytail in a YELLOW JACKET, Tourist B is a young man with a camera in a NAVY SHIRT. These SAME TWO PEOPLE appear in all 4 panels. Top-left panel: Tourist A in yellow jacket and Tourist B in navy shirt happily pose for photos in front of a famous scenic landmark (pagoda or mountain), both smiling with cameras. Top-right panel: The SAME Tourist A in yellow jacket and Tourist B in navy shirt run desperately toward a BUS that is CLEARLY PULLING AWAY — the bus door is closing, exhaust visible, they are waving their arms to stop it but miss it. Bottom-left panel: The SAME Tourist A in yellow jacket and Tourist B in navy shirt stand at a now COMPLETELY EMPTY bus stop, a schedule board showing no more buses tonight, both looking at each other with worried expressions. Bottom-right panel: The SAME Tourist A in yellow jacket and Tourist B in navy shirt sit in the back of a TAXI cab together, laughing and smiling, a hotel building visible through the taxi window as they arrive safely. Professional quality, suitable for Japanese language examination.

text: 下の4コマを見て、登場人物の行動や気持ちを説明しながら、ストーリーを日本語で話してください。

story.panel1: 가족이 거실에서 TV를 보며 즐겁게 시간을 보내고 있다
story.panel2: 갑자기 정전이 되어 온 집이 캄캄해지고 모두 놀란다
story.panel3: 촛불을 켜고 가족 모두가 촛불 주위에 옹기종기 모여 이야기를 나눈다
story.panel4: 전기가 다시 들어오지만 가족은 촛불 대화가 좋았다며 미소 짓는다

imagePrompt: A high-quality 4-panel comic strip in a clean 2x2 grid layout, anime-style illustration, thick black borders between panels, no speech bubbles, no text, bright clear colors, white background. CRITICAL RULE: The family has exactly 3 members who appear in ALL 4 panels: FATHER (tall man with glasses), MOTHER (woman with shoulder-length hair), and ONE YOUNG BOY (approximately 7 years old, wearing a BRIGHT YELLOW T-SHIRT). The BOY ALWAYS wears the BRIGHT YELLOW T-SHIRT and is ALWAYS CLEARLY A BOY with short hair — DO NOT change to a girl. Top-left panel: Father, Mother, and the YOUNG BOY in bright yellow t-shirt watch TV together in a cozy lit living room, all smiling. Top-right panel: The lights and TV suddenly go dark — Father, Mother, and the SAME YOUNG BOY in yellow t-shirt all react with surprise in the darkness. Bottom-left panel: Father, Mother, and the SAME YOUNG BOY in yellow t-shirt sit closely together around lit candles on the table, talking warmly in the dark. Bottom-right panel: The lights come back on — Father, Mother, and the SAME YOUNG BOY in yellow t-shirt remain seated together smiling happily. Professional quality, suitable for Japanese language examination.

text: 下の4コマを見て、登場人物の行動や気持ちを説明しながら、ストーリーを日本語で話してください。

story.panel1: 길을 걷던 주인공이 바닥에 지갑이 떨어져 있는 것을 발견한다
story.panel2: 지갑 안을 열어보니 신분증과 돈이 들어있어 어떻게 할지 고민한다
story.panel3: 경찰서에 가서 주운 지갑을 성실하게 신고·제출한다
story.panel4: 지갑 주인이 찾아와 사례를 하려 하지만 주인공이 정중히 사양한다

imagePrompt: A high-quality 4-panel comic strip in a clean 2x2 grid layout, anime-style illustration, thick black borders between panels, no speech bubbles, no text, bright clear colors, white background. CRITICAL RULE: The MAIN CHARACTER is a young person with short hair wearing a DARK GREY HOODIE and blue jeans. This SAME person in the DARK GREY HOODIE appears in ALL 4 panels — the grey hoodie NEVER changes to any other clothing type, not a polo shirt, not a collar shirt, always a HOODIE. Top-left panel: The young person in DARK GREY HOODIE walks on a city street, notices a wallet lying on the ground, looks surprised. Top-right panel: The SAME person in DARK GREY HOODIE crouches down, carefully examining the wallet contents — an ID card and cash visible — with a thoughtful responsible expression. Bottom-left panel: The SAME person in DARK GREY HOODIE stands at a police station counter, hands the wallet to a uniformed police officer, both looking respectful. Bottom-right panel: The grateful wallet owner meets the SAME person in DARK GREY HOODIE, trying to offer cash as a reward, but the person in grey hoodie politely declines with a kind smile and gentle hand gesture. Professional quality, suitable for Japanese language examination.

story.panel1: 주인공이 처음으로 요리 교실에 참가해 설레는 마음으로 앞치마를 두른다
story.panel2: 레시피를 따라 하지만 순서를 헷갈려 강사가 걱정스러운 눈빛으로 바라본다
story.panel3: 옆의 수강생들이 친절하게 도와주며 함께 요리를 완성해나간다
story.panel4: 완성된 요리를 모두 함께 맛보며 기뻐하고 주인공도 뿌듯한 표정을 짓는다
